## Checklist

- [ ] Issue-backed branch off `dev`; conventional commits ending in `Closes #N`
- [ ] Staged by name (no `git add -A`); no secrets / `.env*`; no AI / Co-Authored-By trailer
- [ ] Backend stays the source of truth; client enforces no business rules
- [ ] Theme tokens (Foundation/Ascent) — no hardcoded colours; responsive on all sizes
- [ ] Loading/error states handled; no `any`
